instructions.title: Install POSmeister
instructions.subtitle: Add POSmeister to your home screen so it opens like a native app.
instructions.hint: Once installed, launch POSmeister from your home screen for offline access and a full-screen experience.

chrome.0: Tap the three-dot menu (⋮) in the top-right of Chrome.
chrome.1: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
chrome.2: Confirm in the dialog. POSmeister appears on your home screen as an app icon.

samsung.0: Tap the menu (≡) in the bottom bar of Samsung Internet.
samsung.2: Choose Home screen, then confirm. POSmeister launches as a stand-alone app from your home screen.

firefox.2: Confirm — POSmeister appears on your home screen.

edge.0: Tap the menu (⋯) at the bottom of Edge.

safari-ios.0: Tap the Share button (square with an arrow) at the bottom of Safari.
safari-ios.1: Scroll down and choose Add to Home Screen.
safari-ios.2: Tap Add in the top-right. POSmeister launches full-screen from your home screen.

chrome-ios.2: Confirm — the app icon appears on your home screen.

offline.offline: Working offline — sales will queue locally and sync when online.

notifications.quietHoursHint: Critical alerts always bypass quiet hours.
